overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat exploring a rocky coastal wasteland at night. The character walks through debris-strewn terrain, passes shipwreck remains, traverses a narrow canyon with towering rock walls, and emerges into a grassy highland with ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal wasteland with scattered wooden debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky terrain toward a distant large rock formation, passing wooden fences and debris

entered.detail: massive rock outcrop resembling a carved face, visible in the distance against the night sky
weathered wooden picket fence running along the right side of the path
large broken wooden ship hull and scattered debris on the rocky ground
round wooden barrel sitting on the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open rocky wasteland at night, illuminated by moonlight. Wooden debris, fences, and shipwreck remains are scattered across the terrain, while a massive rock formation looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock canyon passage with towering walls

events.description: enters the narrow canyon passage between tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon, flanked by towering rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall vertical rock walls forming the left side of the canyon passage
tall vertical rock walls forming the right side of the canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow canyon with towering rock walls that block most of the sky. The path becomes enclosed and darker, with the large rock formation now much closer ahead. The wooden debris of the wasteland is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy highland with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an open grassy area with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward ancient stone ruins visible on the hillside ahead

entered.detail: stone ruins and crumbling walls of an ancient structure on the hillside
tall green grass covering the ground on the left side of the path
tall green grass covering the ground on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the environment opens into a grassy highland under the starry night sky. Tall grass surrounds the path while ancient stone ruins stand on the hillside ahead, marking a transition from the rocky wasteland to a more verdant landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate rocky wasteland that gradually transforms into a verdant highland under a starry night sky. It begins by tracking a character in a red coat through an open, moonlit expanse scattered with wooden debris, fences, and the remains of shipwrecks. As the character advances, the open terrain gives way to a narrow canyon where towering rock walls enclose the path and block the sky, shifting the atmosphere into a darker, more confined space. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the canyon, leaving the rocky walls behind to reveal a grassy highland. Finally, the landscape shifts from stone to greenery, moving through tall grass toward ancient stone ruins perched on a distant hillside.
